# Support · 帮助 · サポート

Need help? Here are the recommended channels, in order of expected response time.

---

## 🇬🇧 English

### 1. 📖 Read the docs first

- [`README.md`](./README.md) — overview, features, quick start
- [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md) — for local dev / data schema / PR workflow
- [`SECURITY.md`](./SECURITY.md) — **for security issues only** (do not open a public issue)
- [`CHANGELOG.md`](./CHANGELOG.md) — recent changes

### 2. 🔍 Search existing issues & discussions

- [Open Issues](https://github.com/badhope/NetTools-Hub/issues)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/badhope/NetTools-Hub/discussions)

### 3. 💬 Open a new discussion

Use the [Q&A category](https://github.com/badhope/NetTools-Hub/discussions/new?category=q-a) for "how do I…" questions.

### 4. 🐛 File an issue

For confirmed bugs / feature requests only — see the [issue templates](./ISSUE_TEMPLATE).

### ⏳ Response time

- **Issues** — first response within **3 business days**
- **Discussions** — community-driven, best effort

---

## 🇨🇳 简体中文

### 1. 📖 先读文档

- [`README.zh.md`](./README.zh.md)
- [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [`SECURITY.md`](./SECURITY.md)（**仅限安全问题**）
- [`CHANGELOG.zh.md`](./CHANGELOG.zh.md)

### 2. 🔍 搜索现有 Issue / Discussion

### 3. 💬 发起新 Discussion

用 [Q&A 分类](https://github.com/badhope/NetTools-Hub/discussions/new?category=q-a) 提问"怎么……"类问题。

### 4. 🐛 提交 Issue

仅针对已确认的 Bug / 功能建议。

### ⏳ 响应时间

- Issue — **3 个工作日内**首次回复
- Discussion — 社区驱动，尽力而为

---

## 🇯🇵 日本語

### 1. 📖 まずドキュメントを読む

- [`README.ja.md`](./README.ja.md)
- [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [`SECURITY.md`](./SECURITY.md)（**セキュリティ問題のみ**）
- [`CHANGELOG.ja.md`](./CHANGELOG.ja.md)

### 2. 🔍 既存の Issue / Discussion を検索

### 3. 💬 新しい Discussion を開始

[Q&A カテゴリ](https://github.com/badhope/NetTools-Hub/discussions/new?category=q-a) で「どうやるの…」系の質問を。

### 4. 🐛 Issue を提出

確認済みのバグ / 機能要望のみ。

### ⏳ 応答時間

- Issue — **3 営業日以内** に初回返信
- Discussion — コミュニティ駆動、ベストエフォート
